AscendC operator compilation failed: multiple NPU target builds (ascend910b, ascend910_93, ascend910) failed to generate .json binaries. This requires NPU compilation infrastructure not available in CPU-only container.

execution_log.output: PyTorch C++ plugin built successfully: libPTAExtensionOPS.so (2.0MB)

execution_log.command: python3 setup.py bdist_wheel (with csrc/ops temporarily renamed to skip AscendC build)

execution_log.error: ImportError: cannot import name 'AutoencoderKLWan' from 'diffusers'. Additionally, NPU hardware is required for sample execution (libhccl.so missing without NPU driver). This is expected behavior per documentation.
execution_log.note: Samples explicitly require NPU hardware as stated in examples/dummy_run/README.md: '确保 NPU 可用'

results.name: examples/dummy_run/wan_infer.py
results.reason: ImportError: diffusers==0.29.0 lacks AutoencoderKLWan; additionally requires NPU hardware (libhccl.so missing)
results.note: 文档明确说明需NPU: '确保 NPU 可用：npu-smi info -l'

documentation_gaps: 文档未明确说明 shell 脚本使用 Windows 行尾符 (CRLF)，在 Linux 环境下构建会失败
CANN 工具链的 x86_64 下载链接未在文档中直接提供（文档以 aarch64 为主）
未说明在没有 NPU 硬件的情况下如何进行部分构建（纯 Python + C++ 插件）
requirements.txt 中 diffusers==0.29.0 缺少 examples/dummy_run 所需的 AutoencoderKLWan 类
未提供 CPU-only 环境下的测试和开发指南
torch_npu 的 x86_64 安装方法未在文档中说明

problems_encountered.problem: Container startup with 'tail -f /dev/null' failed - 'cannot open nul for reading'
problems_encountered.solution: Changed to 'sleep infinity' as container entrypoint

problems_encountered.problem: CANN toolkit install failed - 'flock: command not found'
problems_encountered.solution: Installed util-linux package which provides flock command
problems_encountered.source: openEuler 24.03 minimal image does not include flock by default

problems_encountered.problem: pip install torch from official PyPI timed out
problems_encountered.solution: Configured Tsinghua mirror (pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn) as global pip index

problems_encountered.problem: torch_npu could not be installed normally - requires torch==2.9.0+cpu but we have torch==2.9.0+cu128
problems_encountered.solution: Downloaded torch_npu wheel from Huawei OBS (pytorch_v2.9.0-7.3.0_py311.tar.gz) and installed with --no-deps

problems_encountered.problem: Build failed: 'ld: cannot find -lopapi' - libopapi.so missing
problems_encountered.solution: Downloaded and installed Ascend-cann-910b-ops_8.5.1_linux-x86_64.run from 昇腾OBS repository, which provides libopapi.so

problems_encountered.problem: Shell scripts have Windows CRLF line endings causing bash parse errors
problems_encountered.solution: Used dos2unix to convert all .sh files in build/, tests/, csrc/, mindiesd/ directories
problems_encountered.source: Files in repository edited on Windows

problems_encountered.problem: AscendC operator compilation (build_ops.sh) failed - NPU target compilation requires Ascend NPU compilation infrastructure
problems_encountered.solution: Skipped AscendC build by temporarily renaming csrc/ops directory. Plugin build (build_plugin.sh) succeeded independently.
problems_encountered.source: build/build_ops.sh calls msopgen which requires NPU compiler toolchain

problems_encountered.problem: mindiesd package import fails without NPU driver - torch_npu requires libhccl.so
problems_encountered.solution: Set TORCH_DEVICE_BACKEND_AUTOLOAD=0 to prevent automatic torch_npu loading. Unit tests work with this setting.
problems_encountered.source: torch_npu design - requires NPU runtime libraries

problems_encountered.problem: Sample program (wan_infer.py) fails with ImportError: AutoencoderKLWan not in diffusers 0.29.0
problems_encountered.solution: Not resolved - requires newer diffusers version or NPU hardware for proper testing
problems_encountered.source: examples/dummy_run/wan_infer.py requires diffusers >= 0.34.0 per README, but requirements.txt specifies 0.29.0
